title: Opening for Software Engineer at Medlife Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Medlife Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Medlife Advisory Limited family as a Software Engineer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
